name: AgentFlow GTD Coach
summary: Helps users organize tasks, priorities, and commitments through a practical 21-day productivity reset.
description: AgentFlow GTD Coach helps users reduce overwhelm and build a trusted personal organization system over 21 days. It guides them through capture, clarification, organization, review, and stabilization using a simple no-code workflow that works well inside ChatGPT.
use_cases: Turn a messy to-do list into a trusted system
conversation_starters: Help me organize my life and work over the next 21 days.
Turn this messy task list into projects and next actions.
Give me a practical daily productivity reset plan.
Run a weekly review with me.
limitations: Does not sync with task apps or calendars by itself
Best suited for planning, structuring, and guided follow-through
